tools.name: BookingManagementAPI_OpenAPISpec
tools.description: This tool returns OpenAPI spec for Booking Management API. The Booking Management API allows you to manage Sabre Reservations (bookings) through a set of dedicated services. It offers a range of functionalities, including operations on both bookings and tickets. These features enable seamless management of reservations, ensuring you can easily update, cancel, or verify bookings as needed.

conversationId.description: Session handle from a previous workflow in this conversation. If you already have a conversationId (from a prior flight, hotel, or ticket workflow call), pass it here so all workflows share one session ID. Omit only at the very start of a new conversation.

tools.name: FlightReshopAPI_OpenAPISpec
tools.description: This tool returns OpenAPI spec for Flight Reshop API. The Flight Reshop API provides normalized endpoints designed to perform operations related to multisource exchanges.

conversationId.description: Session handle from a previous workflow in this conversation. If you already have a conversationId (from a prior flight, hotel, or ticket workflow call), pass it here so all workflows share one session ID. Omit only at the very start of a new conversation.

tools.name: callSabreAPI
tools.description: Sends JSON request to Sabre API using full path. Only API paths defined in the provided OpenAPI spec MCP Tools provided by the MCP Server are supported. Returns response in JSON.

requestPayload.description: The JSON body for the request. Look for 'requestBody' schema in the YAML for the chosen path.

fullPath.description: The exact API path. To find it, look into the YAML spec: concatenate the 'servers.variables.basePath.default' value with the specific 'paths' key. Must be one of the enum values.

conversationId.description: The conversationId returned by the Workflow or OpenAPISpec tools. If omitted and no correlation header exists, the call will fail.

tools.name: HotelsSearchAPI_OpenAPISpec
tools.description: This tool returns OpenAPI spec for Hotels Search API. This API performs a broad availability search to find hotel properties within a specific geographical area and defined radius.

tools.name: FlightIssuedTicketManagementWorkflow
tools.description: This tool is the one and only valid entry point for any user request related to operations on existing flight tickets (it is not used to issue a ticket). Use this workflow when the client needs to verify the void, refund, and exchange conditions. Afterwards, client can initiate the process to void or refund chosen tickets.

conversationId.description: Session handle from a previous workflow in this conversation. If you already have a conversationId (from a prior flight, hotel, or ticket workflow call), pass it here so all workflows share one session ID. Omit only at the very start of a new conversation.

tools.name: SearchAndBookHotelWorkflow
tools.description: This tool is the one and only valid entry point for any user request related to searching for, pricing, or booking a hotel. This tool retrieves the strict, sequential workflow definition that the agent is required to execute. The agent's primary function is to receive these steps and then execute them exactly as specified, without deviation. Do not attempt to search for or book a hotel using any other method.
